package repository

import "context"

// ParametersRepository is a draft repository boundary for parameters.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type ParametersRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query ParametersQuery) ([]Parameter, error)
}

type ParametersQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
